info.name: REST APIs PROJECT1-FINAL COPY
info.description: StartFragment - **Project name: Student database** - **API type: REST API or RESTful API** - **API classification: Public APIs + Secured APIs** - **Security Algorithm used: Bearer Access Token** - **How to get Access Token: Login with gmail/github/microsoft account here** [https://gorest.co.in/consumer/login](https://gorest.co.in/consumer/login)  - **\# of APIs developed: 4** - **LIST USERS API** - **CREATE USER API** - **UPDATE USER API** - **DELETE USER API** - **HTTP methods used in the APIs: GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE** - **API documentation format: cURL** **API documentation URL:** [https://gorest.co.in/](https://gorest.co.in/) EndFragment

item.description:
This folder consists of all _positive test cases_ related to the project for all the APIs listed below, to create, update & delete multiple users at the same time:

1. CREATE USER API
    
2. UPDATE USER API
    
3. DELETE USER API
